name: tokenwatch
description: TokenWatch — compare pay-as-you-go LLM inference pricing across providers

scripts.fetch:all: node scripts/fetch-pricing.mjs && node scripts/fetch-images.mjs && node scripts/fetch-videos.mjs
scripts.build:prod: node scripts/fetch-pricing.mjs && node scripts/fetch-images.mjs && node scripts/fetch-videos.mjs && echo 'Static site in ./public'
